seoTitle: How to Make Facebook Reels in Canva
metaDescription: Create engaging Facebook Reels in Canva using templates, graphics, and audio, an easy way for creators and small businesses to boost brand visibility.
intro: Facebook Reels are becoming an important part of social media strategy alongside TikTok and Instagram Reels, and Canva makes it straightforward to produce polished short-form video without specialized editing software. This guide covers building a Reel from a template through to exporting and publishing.

steps.heading: Choose a Reels template or start fresh
steps.body: Browse Canva's pre-made Reels templates to get a head start, or set up a blank vertical video canvas sized for Facebook Reels.

steps.heading: Add your visuals and design elements
steps.body: Bring in photos, video clips, and graphic elements that fit your brand and the message you're promoting.

steps.heading: Add audio to your Reel
steps.body: Layer in music or voiceover audio to give the video energy and match the pacing of your visuals.

steps.heading: Finalize and export your Reel
steps.body: Preview the full video, make any last adjustments, and export it in a format ready for uploading to Facebook.

faq.question: Do I need video editing experience to make a Facebook Reel in Canva?
faq.answer: No, Canva's Reels tools are designed to be accessible for both beginners and experienced content creators.

faq.question: Can I use Canva templates for Facebook Reels specifically?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva offers templates designed for Reels-style vertical video that you can adapt with your own content.

faq.question: How long should a Facebook Reel be?
faq.answer: Facebook Reels are short-form videos, so keeping your Canva project concise and focused works best for engagement.

faq.question: Can I add audio directly in Canva when making a Reel?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add music or voiceover tracks directly within Canva's video editor as part of building the Reel.
